text: Gucci Group needs a group-level leadership system that strengthens talent development and inter-brand mobility without damaging individual brand identity.
The shared competency framework in the simulation is organized around four themes: Vision, Entrepreneurship, Passion, and Trust.
The CEO cares about protecting luxury brand DNA and is skeptical of one-size-fits-all leadership frameworks that feel too generic.
The Regional Manager focuses on rollout readiness, local training needs, communication plans, and adoption risks across markets.
A key deliverable in the simulation is a 360-degree feedback and coaching program tailored to the competency framework and supported by clear privacy, communication, and coaching design.
Success should be measured with both leading and lagging indicators, such as adoption, training completion, mobility, and insight dashboards for executives.
